---
title: "Instructor"
author: "Davi Moreira"
editor: visual
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .overflow-table { font-size: 0.85rem; width: 100%; line-height: 1.25; }
  .overflow-table th, .overflow-table td {
    padding: 0.35rem; text-align: left; word-wrap: break-word; vertical-align: top;
  }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(1), .overflow-table td:nth-child(1) { width: 34%; }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(2), .overflow-table td:nth-child(2) { width: 12%; }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(3), .overflow-table td:nth-child(3) { width: 18%; }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(4), .overflow-table td:nth-child(4) { width: 16%; }
  .below-table { font-size: 0.85rem; line-height: 1.3; margin-top: 1rem; }
</style>
```

# Instructor Material

Instructor notebooks (with solutions) and session guides, one row per topic.
Both live in the **private** repository
[`davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor`](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor){target="_blank"} —
opening them requires being signed in to GitHub as the instructor. One-time
Colab setup: open [colab.research.google.com](https://colab.research.google.com/github){target="_blank"},
choose the GitHub tab, and check **"Include private repos"** when authorizing.

::: overflow-table

| Topic | Sessions | Notebook (solutions) | Session guide | Readings |
|-------|----------|----------------------|---------------|----------|
| **Week 1 — Research in the age of AI** | | | | |
| **Topic 00 · Research in the age of AI: your arm, your RA — not your brain** | 2 lectures | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb00_ai_arm_not_brain_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/00_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 1, 2 |
| **Week 2 — From curiosity to a research problem** | | | | |
| **Topic 01 · From curiosity to a research problem: descriptive, predictive, causal** | 2 lectures | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb01_curiosity_to_problem_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/01_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 4, 7<br>*+ optional CB case* |
| **Week 3 — Research builds on research** | | | | |
| **Topic 02 · Research builds on research: verified evidence + real gaps** | 1 lecture | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb02_research_builds_on_research_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/02_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 4 |
| **Week 4 — The anatomy of a research design** | | | | |
| **Topic 03 · The anatomy of a research design: MIDA + declare → diagnose → redesign** | 2 lectures | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb03_anatomy_of_design_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/03_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 2, 5, 10<br>*+ optional CB case* |
| **Week 5 — Observational descriptive research** | | | | |
| **Topic 04 · Observational descriptive research** | 2 lectures | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb04_observational_descriptive_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/04_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 15<br>*+ optional CB case* |
| **Week 6 — Observational causal research** | | | | |
| **Topic 05 · Observational causal research** | 2 lectures | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb05_observational_causal_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/05_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 16<br>*+ optional CB case* |
| **Week 7 — Experimental descriptive research** | | | | |
| **Topic 06 · Experimental descriptive research** | 2 lectures | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb06_experimental_descriptive_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/06_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 17 |
| **Week 8 — Prediction** | | | | |
| **Topic 07 · Prediction: generalizing to unseen cases** | 1 lecture | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb07_prediction_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/07_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | *+ optional CB case* |
| **Week 9 — Experimental causal research** | | | | |
| **Topic 08 · Experimental causal research** | 2 lectures | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb08_experimental_causal_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/08_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 18 |
| **Week 10 — Share the research and attack the analysis** | | | | |
| **Topic 09 · Share the research + attack the analysis** | 2 lectures | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb09_attack_the_analysis_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/09_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | *+ optional CB case* |
| **Week 11 — Poster criticism and final poster lock** | | | | |
| **Topic 10 · Poster criticism + final poster lock** | 2 lectures | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb10_poster_criticism_lock_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/10_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | — |
| **Week 12 — Poster delivery** | | | | |
| **Topic 11 · Poster delivery: pitches, uncertainty, difficult questions** | 2 lectures | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb11_poster_delivery_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/11_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | — |
| **Week 13 — Conference week** | | | | |
| **Topic 12 · Final conference preparation, presentation + reflection** | 1 lecture | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb12_conference_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/12_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | — |
| **Week 14 — Thanksgiving async: replication and red-team** | | | | |
| **Topic 13 · Async module: replication + red-team of a peer's package** | async module | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb13_replication_redteam_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/13_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | — |
| **Week 15 — From poster to research note** | | | | |
| **Topic 14 · From poster to research note** | 2 lectures | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb14_poster_to_research_note_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/14_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | — |
| **Week 16 — Managing multiple AI agents** | | | | |
| **Topic 15 · Managing multiple AI agents + the final defense** | 2 lectures | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb15_managing_ai_agents_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/15_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 24 |

:::
::: below-table

Instructor material is synced by `scripts/sync_instructor_repo.sh` after each
notebook build. This page is encrypted at render time
(`scripts/protect_instructor_page.py`); the password gate is a courtesy lock —
the private repository plus GitHub authentication is the real protection.

:::
